subject: English
title: A Triumph of Surgery – Hard Short Notes

key_points: The prose is a social critique of emotional excess supported by wealth
The title reflects deep irony and misunderstanding of true care
Tricki’s recovery symbolises a return to natural, disciplined living
The vet balances professional ethics with human empathy
Humour prevents the story from becoming preachy
characters: Tricki – Symbol of imbalance caused by excessive affection
Mrs Pumphrey – Represents emotional dependence and loneliness
The Vet – Embodiment of rational thinking and ethical professionalism
literary_devices: Satirical humour – Gentle criticism of society
Symbolism – Tricki as a symbol of overindulgence
Contrast – Luxury at home vs discipline at surgery
exam_tips: Analyse the title beyond surface-level irony
Use character contrast to explain the theme
Link humour with effective social criticism
